title: Decenza Profile Knowledge Base
description: Single authored source for app-specific per-profile knowledge. Parsed by QJsonDocument at load; validated at build time (change: restructure-kb-as-validated-json). The portable profile JSON is NOT described here and is never mirrored into the KB (design D7).

schemaVersion.description: Bump on any breaking schema change so the loader/validator can reject an unexpected shape loudly.

profileEntry.description: One KB section. `id` is the ONLY identity key; aliases resolve to an `id` (design D4). `displayName` is a human label, NOT a key — renaming it never breaks identity. `category`, `roast`, and `summary` are intentionally NOT fields (design D3) — folded into `prose`; additionalProperties:false rejects them if reintroduced.

id.description: Stable kebab-case canonical identity — the sole key for resolution, cross-references, and consumer APIs. MUST be unique (validator-enforced). Never derived from prose; chosen once and stable under any displayName change.

displayName.description: Human-readable label (e.g. "D-Flow Q variant"). Presentational prose, NOT a key — nothing resolves or cross-references by this.

alsoMatches.description: Exact match-input titles (profile/section names users present) that resolve to this entry's `id`. Every alias MUST resolve to exactly one entry; no duplicate or orphaned alias (design D4/D5).

defaultForEditorType.description: If set, this entry is the resolver fallback for that editor type. At most one entry per editor type (validator-enforced).

inferred.description: true when the position is a reasoned estimate (the leading '~' in the old markdown), not from the UGS chart.

ugs.description: Universal Grind Setting position. Optional — reference/skip-catalog sections and non-espresso entries omit it.

analysisFlags.description: Profile-agnostic suppression flags consumed by analyzeShot() (e.g. flow_trend_ok, channeling_expected, grind_check_skip). The flag->behavior semantics stay in C++ (design D2); only the per-profile assignment is data here.

skipCatalog.description: true marks cross-cutting reference material (not a profile) — excluded from buildProfileCatalog, surfaced via crossProfileReferenceContent.

family.description: Closed-vocabulary cluster tag. The advisor prompt builds switching-recommendation logic on family membership (design D3). Optional only for skipCatalog reference sections; required for real profiles (validator-enforced).

summary.description: Short human descriptor for the profile-catalog line ('<name> — <summary> [family: <family>]'). Replaces the old fragile Category:/Roast: prose-scrape. Optional only for skipCatalog sections.

expertBand.description: Optional. Absent => expertBandForKbId returns std::nullopt (strict no-op, design D6). Never fabricate a band to 'complete' a profile.

prose.description: One opaque string: the verbatim section body minus the parsed lines, '\n'-joined. Nothing parses inside it (design D3). Numbers here are commentary, never injected (design D9). MUST NOT restate the expertBand as the band (validator best-effort lint).

allOf.comment: A real (non-skipCatalog) profile must also carry `family`. The `if` requires skipCatalog PRESENT and true — without `required` it would pass vacuously when skipCatalog is absent (the common case), and the `else` would never apply. `id`/`displayName`/`prose` are already top-level required.

axis.description: The stated axis. Never an axis a source did not state (design D2).

provenance.description: Honest epistemic status (design D10): `cited` = backed by an external/archived real doc; `author-stated` = stated in the profile's own shipped notes; `inferred` = reasoned, no source — `rationale` MUST justify why we believe it. `src` is required for `cited`, forbidden for `inferred` (validator-enforced).

lo.description: Lower bound. Optional => no floor (ceiling-only rail). If both lo and hi are present, lo < hi (validator-enforced).

hi.description: Upper bound. Optional => no ceiling (floor-only rail, e.g. Allongé flow floor).

src.description: Citation: a followable http/https URL whenever an external source exists, else a closed intrinsic-source token. Resolved from the existing source attributions during migration — never fabricated (design D3).

srcArchive.description: Optional repo-relative path to a durable local copy under docs/kb_sources/ (link-rot insurance). If set, the validator hard-fails when the file is absent. Intrinsic profile-notes sources need none.

rationale.description: The citation/validation audit (the former kBands C++ comment, verbatim). JSON has no comments; this is its home.

proseRestatesBand.description: Optional reviewed acknowledgment that this entry's prose intentionally states a value coinciding with a band bound because it narrates the profile's OWN setpoint / cited dial-in (the Adaptive-v2 case, design D9). A non-empty string silences the validator's best-effort D9 lint for this entry and records WHY it is profile commentary, not a band copy. A stale ack (prose no longer restates any bound) is itself surfaced as a non-fatal warning so the suppression set cannot rot; a present-but-malformed value hard-fails the build and does NOT suppress (a broken silencer never silences).
